iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 06:00 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Hegseth claims Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 'likely disfigured' from earlier strikes — leadership instability is a wildcard but doesn't directly map to nuclear escalation signals. Intense strikes on central Tehran reported (Al Jazeera live). Iran still channeling response through conventional means: Hormuz blockade, missile barrages, oil infrastructure threats. Nuclear track continues de-escalation despite conventional escalation. 14% (no change).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 10:04 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) US EMBASSY BAGHDAD HIT: Kataib Hezbollah missile struck embassy helipad, smoke rising (Reuters/Al Jazeera/AP). Embassy 'C-RAM' interception system targeted. (2) Iran threatens retaliation against 'ALL oil, energy and economic infrastructure of oil companies across the region with American stock shares' — broadest threat yet, targeting Gulf state assets (Iran International/ISNA). (3) Kharg Island aftermath: Trump confirms 'obliterated every military target.' (4) CNBC: Hormuz near-closure disrupts 20M bbl/day. Oil above $100, spiked $120. (5) Iran parliament speaker warned 'new level of retaliation.' (6) 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured in Iran. 500+ missiles, ~2000 drones since Feb 28. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 06:04 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios: Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but NOT other infrastructure. (2) IDF bombed bridge in south Lebanon — claimed Hezbollah using for troop/weapon movement. (3) Ground invasion planning continues: seize area south of Litani, 'largest since 2006.' 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza.' (4) 773+ killed including 100+ children. 800K-1M displaced. (5) 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded. (6) Hezbollah Radwan forces attempting raids on northern Israel. UNIFIL: 210+ rockets since March 2. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL RISING. Third intercept confirmed March 13. NATO spokesperson Allison Hart: 'NATO remains vigilant and stands firm in its defence of all allies.' Sirens blared in Adana (Incirlik province). Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting, calls incidents 'possible false flag.' Politico EU: one more intercept likely triggers Article 4 consultations. 53 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 59. One intercept from IMMINENT.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new direct signals. Modi expressed 'deep concern,' spoke with Iranian President about Indian citizen safety. India condemns Pakistan strikes on Afghanistan, supports Afghan sovereignty — but this is diplomatic, not military escalation. UK FCDO advises against travel within 10km of India-Pakistan border. Pakistan-Afghanistan war now at IMMINENT (71) but no coupling rule FROM Pakistan to India. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) ISW: Global oil price shock from Iran war has 'likely invalidated' assumptions about Russian economic downturn forcing Kremlin concessions — sanctions pressure weakened. (2) Russia condemns Ukrainian strike on Bryansk as 'terrorist attack,' accuses Britain of overstepping legal norms (Reuters). (3) Putin and Trump discussed both Iran and Ukraine wars — no breakthrough. (4) Russia 1,277,620 total casualties since 2022, 860 killed/wounded in last 24h. (5) Sweden boards suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker. 30 + 4 (Iran coupling) + 4 (Turkey coupling) = 38.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. (1) CNBC/AP: China warplane flights near Taiwan plunged from 92 to 7 over past two weeks — sharpest drop in years, puzzling analysts. Suggests deliberate de-escalation or strategic patience while US overextends in ME. (2) US THAAD fully relocated from South Korea — all 6 launcher vehicles departed. Creates significant Asia defense gap. (3) PRC increased 2026 military budget and escalated rhetoric at NPC (March 12). (4) $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval ahead of Xi summit March 31. China appears to be letting US overextend while quietly preparing. 12 + 6 (THAAD) - 3 (reduced flights) = 15.

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING - MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) North Korea fired ~10 ballistic missiles in salvo Saturday morning (March 14) - not a single test but coordinated barrage from western coast. Japan confirms fell into Sea of Japan, traveled ~340km outside Japan EEZ. THIRD provocation this week. (2) Timed during US-South Korea joint military drills - direct provocation. (3) Launches came AFTER Trump's dialogue outreach - rejecting diplomacy. (4) South Korea JCS: 'unprecedented pace of provocations.' Escalation from routine testing to multi-missile salvo demonstrates coordination and capacity. 8 + 12 (missile test) + 10 (salvo/barrage) + 5 (rhetoric) + 2 (China coupling) = 37. CRITICAL.

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) Ceasefire by end of March at 2% on Polymarket — effectively dead. (2) ISW: Oil price shock invalidates assumptions about Russian economic pressure — war economy benefits from $100+ oil. (3) Russia condemns Bryansk strike as 'terrorist attack' using British missiles. (4) Ukrainian GUR strikes Russian radar stations and drone infrastructure. (5) France pledges continued support: 'Russia is mistaken, hoping for a respite.' 35 + 5 (Russia critical) + 5 (Turkey critical) = 45.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) PAKISTAN DECLARES 'OPEN WAR': Defence Minister Khawaja Asif announced state of 'open war' with Afghanistan. Pakistan escalated airstrikes across Afghanistan including Kabul and Kandahar. (2) AFGHANISTAN HITS ISLAMABAD: Afghan drone struck 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad's Faizabad area — first strike on Pakistan's capital. Pakistan claims drones intercepted. (3) KOHAT FORT DESTROYED: Taliban claims destruction of Kohat military fortress and Durand Line command center. (4) CIVILIAN CASUALTIES: Pakistan airstrikes kill civilians in Kabul (4) and Kandahar (2), destroy Kam Air fuel depot. (5) Taliban retaliates with cross-border drone strikes. (6) Nuclear dimension: A nuclear-armed state in open war with neighbor striking near capital = extreme escalation risk. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 = 55 + 16 (nuclear_escalation signal) = 71. IMMINENT.

North Korea fires ~10 ballistic missiles in salvo during US-South Korea drills — THIRD provocation this week, unprecedented pace (Reuters/Bloomberg)
Israel planning massive ground invasion to seize area south of Litani River — 'largest since 2006.' 773+ killed, 800K-1M displaced (Axios/Guardian)
NATO intercepts third Iranian missile over Turkey — one more triggers Article 4. Spain Patriot crews at Incirlik confirmed detection (Reuters/NYT)
China warplane flights near Taiwan plunge from 92 to 7 in two weeks — analysts puzzled by sharpest drop in years (CNBC/AP)
ISW: $100+ oil 'invalidates' Russian economic pressure forecasts — Kremlin war economy benefits from price shock (ISW)

zone_changes: pakistan_afghanistan: 36→71 (IMMINENT) — open_war_declared +10, taliban_retaliation +7, nuclear_escalation +15, base rate raised to 25. HIGHEST SINGLE-JUMP this cycle: +35 points
global: 63→66 — Pakistan-Afghanistan now third IMMINENT zone, coupling cascades amplify system-wide risk
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION — Day 15 06:00 SCAN — Global war probability 66% (IMMINENT). THREE TRACKERS NOW AT IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (71). Pakistan-Afghanistan SURGES to IMMINENT with Afghanistan striking near Pakistan's capital — a nuclear-armed state in open war. This is the third active conflict zone reaching imminent status. Iran and Israel-Lebanon remain at maximum. Turkey critical (59) — one intercept from Article 4. Russia critical (38) — oil shock undermines sanctions. Russia-Ukraine critical (45) — ceasefire dead. DPRK elevated (22) — second missile test. Nuclear track still de-escalating at 14%. WATCH: (1) Pakistan-Afghanistan nuclear dimension — open war between nuclear state and neighbor striking capital. (2) Iran retaliation for Kharg + Tehran strikes. (3) Lebanon ground invasion deployment. (4) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4. (5) DPRK follow-up. (6) Oil price spike from ME + Asia conflicts.

latest_news.headline: China warplane flights near Taiwan plunge from 92 to 7 in two weeks — analysts puzzled
latest_news.text: China's regular warplane flights near Taiwan dropped sharply from 92 to just 7 over the past two weeks — the sharpest decline in years. Analysts unsure if this is deliberate de-escalation, strategic patience while US overextends in Iran, or operational reorganization. ISW notes PRC increased 2026 military budget simultaneously.

latest_news.headline: US Embassy in Baghdad hit by Kataib Hezbollah missile — smoke rising from compound
latest_news.text: Kataib Hezbollah claimed missile strike on US Embassy Baghdad, hitting helipad and C-RAM interception system. Smoke rising from compound. Iraqi security sources confirm damage. Iran-backed militia released video of strike. Major escalation — direct attack on US diplomatic facility in theater.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens retaliation against 'ALL oil, energy infrastructure' of American-linked companies region-wide
latest_news.text: Iran announced it would retaliate by immediately attacking 'all oil, energy and economic infrastructure of oil companies across the region that have American stock shares or cooperate with America.' Broadest threat yet — targets Gulf state assets (UAE, Qatar, Saudi, Bahrain, Kuwait) beyond Iranian territory.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone strikes on Pakistani cities
latest_news.text: Pakistan President Asif Ali Zardari declared Afghan Taliban 'crossed a red line' by launching drone attacks on civilian targets in Pakistan. Military says 'rudimentary drones' targeted Abbottabad, Swabi, Nowshera — all foiled. Reinforces open war status.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires ~10 ballistic missiles in salvo during US-South Korea drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fired approximately 10 ballistic missiles from its western coast Saturday morning. Japan confirms projectiles traveled ~340km into Sea of Japan outside Japan EEZ. Coordinated salvo during US-South Korea joint drills. Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS calls it unprecedented pace.

latest_news.headline: Israel planning massive ground invasion to seize area south of Litani River — 'largest since 2006'
latest_news.text: Israel planning large-scale ground operation in Lebanon to dismantle Hezbollah infrastructure south of Litani. US and Israeli officials confirm. 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza.' Agreed to spare Beirut airport but not other infrastructure. 773+ killed in Lebanon, 800K-1M displaced.

latest_news.headline: NATO intercepts third Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey — one from Article 4
latest_news.text: NATO air defenses intercepted third Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey in 10 days. Sirens in Adana near Incirlik Air Base. Turkey asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting. Politico EU: one more intercept likely triggers Article 4 consultations. Spain's Patriot crews at Incirlik confirmed detection.

latest_news.headline: ISW: Global oil price shock from Iran war 'invalidates' Russian economic pressure assumptions
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: $100+ oil from Iran war has 'likely invalidated' forecasts that Russian economic downturn would force Kremlin concessions. War economy now benefits from price shock. Sweden boards suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker. Macron: Russia wrong to think Iran war gives them a 'break.'

latest_news.headline: UN clash: US-allies vs Russia-China over Iran nuclear program — diplomatic split deepens
latest_news.text: US and Western allies clashed with Russia and China at UN Security Council over Iran nuclear program. Russia accused West of using IAEA as pretext for military action. UK House of Commons briefing details how 2024-2026 strikes undermined Iran's defences. Global diplomatic split widens.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 67%. FOUR TRACKERS AT IMMINENT (100, 100, 71) + Turkey at 65 (near-imminent). KEY DEVELOPMENTS: (1) US Embassy Baghdad HIT by Kataib Hezbollah missile — Iran-backed proxy strikes US diplomatic compound. (2) Iran broadest threat yet: retaliation against ALL oil/energy infrastructure of American-linked companies across entire region. (3) Pakistan President Zardari says Taliban 'crossed a red line.' (4) NOTABLE DE-ESCALATION: China warplane flights near Taiwan plunge from 92 to 7 in two weeks — sharpest drop in years. China appears to be exercising strategic patience while US overextends. NO new conflict zones detected. Watch list: (a) Iran retaliation for Baghdad + Kharg + Tehran strikes. (b) 4th Turkey intercept triggers Article 4. (c) Lebanon ground invasion deployment imminent. (d) DPRK follow-up after 10-missile salvo. (e) US military overextension — fighting on 4 fronts. (f) Oil super-spike. (g) Pakistan-Afghanistan nuclear dimension. (h) China strategic patience vs. PRC military budget increase.
